executive.headline: Every grant agreement will be turned into a clear, dated obligation calendar and evidence checklist.
executive.subhead: Our platform transforms grant compliance into a manageable, operational system that ensures timely reporting and strong evidence trails.

technical.headline: AI Nonprofit Governance Platform: a focused workflow, not a generic shell
technical.subhead: Our AI-driven document intake and compliance tracker extracts obligations from grant agreements, creating a 90-day reporting checklist and evidence collection system.

end-user.headline: Every grant agreement will be turned into a clear, dated obligation calendar and evidence checklist.
end-user.subhead: With our platform, you'll never miss a reporting deadline or struggle to find required evidence again.
